title: VisualMLModel Architecture-Diagram IR v1.0
description: A GENERAL left-to-right node+edge graph that mimics a hand-drawn paper/README architecture figure: inputs on the LEFT, outputs/losses on the RIGHT, with branching, merging, dashed loss/auxiliary edges, and grouping banners (e.g. 'ONLY DURING TRAINING'). Unlike flow_v1 (an ordered LINEAR spine), this is an explicit directed graph laid out automatically into left-to-right layers. Rendered as a deterministic dependency-free inline SVG. NOTE: nodes/edges/groups are TOP-LEVEL (no 'graph' key) so this never collides with the ir_v1 structural validator.

arch_family.description: one-line family, e.g. 'multi-camera -> view fusion -> trajectory planner + future-state aux'

nodes.description: every box in the figure. Order does NOT imply flow; flow is given by edges. Layout (left->right columns) is computed from edges + optional lane/row hints.

id.description: unique; referenced by edges and group members

title.description: short bold box title, e.g. 'Driving Policy', 'Concat inputs'

desc.description: 1-2 line plain-language description shown inside the box; WRAPPED by the renderer

shape.description: ONE tensor shape shown in the box, free-form paren string PREFERRED, e.g. '(8,96,56,56)' or '(2328)'. null for loss/abstract nodes. (Array form tolerated and normalized to paren style by the renderer.)

role.description: drives box color. The FIRST group are shared ontology/flow roles; the LAST 5 are new figure-level roles for arch mode.

train_only.description: true if this node exists ONLY during training (aux/self-supervision/loss path). Drives the 'ONLY DURING TRAINING' banner + a dimmed/dashed box. Default false.

lane.description: OPTIONAL column hint, 0=leftmost (inputs). Omit/null to let the layout compute it (longest-path over dataflow edges). Fill for ALL nodes or NONE.

row.description: OPTIONAL vertical-order hint WITHIN a lane (smaller = higher). Omit/null to auto-order.

group.description: id of a groups[] entry this node belongs to (banner membership), or null

detail.description: optional extra sentences shown on click (reuses the #tip mechanism)

edges.description: directed connections. SOLID = dataflow; DASHED is IMPLIED by kind. Unlike flow_v1, you MUST list the main dataflow edges (there is no implied spine).

kind.description: dataflow=solid gray forward tensor (used for layering); loss=dashed pink edge into a loss node incl. predicted-vs-true comparisons; feedback=dashed amber temporal/recurrent/conditioning/history loop (excluded from layering, bows back); skip=thin gold residual/shortcut (excluded from layering).

label.description: optional edge label, e.g. 'fused 8x8 grid (K,V)', 'ego_hidden', 'Trajectory Loss'

groups.description: labeled banner bands spanning several nodes, e.g. 'ONLY DURING TRAINING'.

members.description: node ids covered; if omitted, the renderer uses all nodes with train_only=true
